_meta.description: Canonical fallback map for degraded model slots. Resolve slot identity in models/MODEL_REGISTRY.json first.
_meta.rule: Fallback paths are NAS runtime references only; no fallback weights are committed.

sbert_minilm.reason: M02 metadata/weight files are degraded; MiniLM is the safe canonical embedder copy.
sbert_minilm.retirement_condition: M02_embedder is repaired and verified non-zero.

deberta_nli.reason: M03 metadata files are degraded; DeBERTa NLI is the safe canonical contradiction fallback.
deberta_nli.retirement_condition: M03_contradiction is repaired and verified non-zero.
